<Meta title="Tokens/Effects/Border Radius" />

# Border Radius

Corner radius tokens applied to buttons, cards, inputs, and other UI surfaces. Radius selection affects the visual personality of the design — rounder values feel more friendly and modern, while sharper values feel more structured and formal.

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={EffectsStories.Radius} />
</div>
